mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_import_item ( batch_id, item_order, source_question_no, question_type, normalized_question_type, category_path, status, errors_json, warnings_json, parsed_json, markdown_block, target_question_id ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{itemOrder}, #{sourceQuestionNo}, #{questionType}, #{normalizedQuestionType}, #{categoryPath}, #{status}, #{errorsJson}, #{warningsJson}, #{parsedJson}, #{markdownBlock}, #{targetQuestionId} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_id, item_order, source_question_no, question_type, normalized_question_type, category_path, status, errors_json, warnings_json, parsed_json, markdown_block, target_question_id FROM question_import_item WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY item_order ASC

SELECT id, batch_id, item_order, source_question_no, question_type, normalized_question_type, category_path, status, errors_json, warnings_json, parsed_json, markdown_block, target_question_id FROM question_import_item WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND status IN ('READY', 'WARNING') ORDER BY item_order ASC
